use_cases: Displaying luxury hotel properties with amenities and pricing on travel booking platforms
Showcasing accommodation options with visual appeal on hotel booking websites
Presenting property listings with ratings and key features for travelers
Creating visually engaging hotel cards for travel agency applications
Building property showcase sections for boutique hotel marketing websites
ai_summary: A visually appealing hotel showcase component designed for displaying accommodation properties with imagery, pricing, ratings, and key amenities. Built for travel and hospitality platforms with mixed device support, featuring elegant gradients and hover interactions to highlight property details and encourage booking engagement.
